comments.author: @SanskritiPCS
comments.text:
UPSC Mains Residential Mentorship Program 2026

Start Date: 5th June 2026

A comprehensive residential mentorship program designed for UPSC aspirants preparing for the Civil Services Mains Examination 2026. The program focuses on answer writing, personalized mentorship, strategic guidance, test discussions, and holistic preparation under expert supervision in a disciplined residential environment.

Program Highlights:

* Personalized mentorship and guidance
* Daily answer writing practice
* Mains-focused strategy sessions
* Regular tests and evaluations
* One-on-one performance analysis
* Structured study environment
* Expert faculty support

For More Details: https://www.sanskritiias.com/upsc-residential-program
